---
title: "IOF_DSR"
author: "DSRovinsky"
date: '2022-07-28'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Manipulate data
```{r Load packages}
library(ape)
library(geiger)
library(tidyverse)
library(nlme)
library(svglite)
library(here)
```

```{r Functions}
source(here::here("Functions", "Fun.R"))
```


```{r Get some data}
rawData <- read.csv(here::here("Data", "IOF_Data_Muchlinski.csv"))

# data is a combination of Muchlinski, 2010 (doi:10.1016/j.jhevol.2010.01.012) and 
# Milne et al., 2021 (doi:10.1002/ar.24683) with new specimens (e.g., the fossil taxa) added

# This tree is pruned down from a Maximum Clade Compatibility (MCC) tree from 1,000 trees 
# sampled from the dataset of Upham et al., (2019; doi:10.1371/journal.pbio.3000494). 
# Data downloaded from https://vertlife.org/
pruned_MCC <- read.tree(here::here("Data", "pruned_MCC.tre"))
treeTips <- read.csv(here::here("Data", "Tree_tips.csv")) # .csv of the tips for each dataset


```

```{r Data manipulation}
# Do some dataframe manipulation
workData <- rawData[,1:5]
# These PtSets seem suspicious to me. Get them outta here!
workData <- workData[- which(workData$Species == "Tarsipes_rostratus"),]
workData <- workData[- which(workData$Species == "Ommatophoca_rossii"),]

workData$Group[workData$Group == "Pinniped"] <- "Placental" # these categories aren't needed for us
workData$Group[workData$Group == "Fissiped"] <- "Placental" # these categories aren't needed for us
workData$Group[workData$Group == "Marsupial"] <- "Metatheria" # these categories aren't needed for us
workData$Group[workData$Group == "Sparassodonta"] <- "Metatheria" # these categories aren't needed for us

workData$log_GM <- log10(workData$GM_mean)
workData$log_IOF <- log10(workData$IOF_mean)
workData$log_Mass <- log10(workData$Mass_mean)

workData$ID <- str_c(substr(workData$Species,1,3), str_to_title(substr(sub(".*_", "", workData$Species),1,3)) )

# prune the MCCtree to the species in the dataset
muchlinskiTips <- as.data.frame(treeTips[,5:6])
muchlinskiTips <- muchlinskiTips[- which(muchlinskiTips[,2] == "Tarsipes_rostratus"),]
muchlinskiTips <- muchlinskiTips[- which(muchlinskiTips[,2] == "Ommatophoca_rossii"),]
muchlinskiTips <- na.omit(muchlinskiTips$Tips3)
 
muchlinskiTree <- keep.tip(pruned_MCC, muchlinskiTips)

# Upham et al. did not include F. silvestris, but the clade containing F. bieti is likely the sister clade
# to that containing F. silvestris to the exclusion of the other Felis spp. in the tree (F. chaus), 
# so the position of F. bieti can be substituted here for F. silvestris
muchlinskiTree$tip.label[139] <- "Felis_silvestris"

rm(muchlinskiTips, pruned_MCC, treeTips)

```

```{r Convex hulls}
# Generate convex hulls around the PtSets
metatheriaHull <- workData[which(workData$Group == "Metatheria"),]
placentalHull <- workData[which(workData$Group == "Placental"),]


# metatheriaHull <- metatheriaHull[-which(metatheriaHull$Species == "Thylacinus_cynocephalus"),] # just for show
metatheriaHull <- cbind(metatheriaHull$log_Mass, metatheriaHull$log_IOF)
placentalHull <- cbind(placentalHull$log_Mass, placentalHull$log_IOF)


mHpts <- chull(metatheriaHull)
mHpts <- c(mHpts, mHpts[1])

pHpts <- chull(placentalHull)
pHpts <- c(pHpts, pHpts[1])
```

```{r IOF Plot set up}
# PtCols and pch values for easy plotting
IOFplotData <- workData

IOFplotData$PtCol <- "#fff0e0"
IOFplotData$PtCol[IOFplotData$Group == "Metatheria"] <- "#e0f0ff" # blue
IOFplotData$PtCol[IOFplotData$Species == "Thylacinus_cynocephalus"] <- "#c87ef8" # electric purple
IOFplotData$PtCol[IOFplotData$Species == "Nimbacinus_dicksoni"] <- "#6b4d80" # dark purple - to see position
IOFplotData$PtCol[IOFplotData$Species == "Borhyaena_tuberata"] <- "#ca576c" # red - to see position
IOFplotData$PtCol[IOFplotData$Species == "Prothylacinus_patagonicus"] <- "#ca576c" # red - to see position
IOFplotData$PtCol[IOFplotData$Species == "Canis_lupus"] <- "#233045" # navy - to see position

IOFplotData[,"PtSet"] <- NA
IOFplotData$PtSet[IOFplotData$Group == "Placental"] <- 21
IOFplotData$PtSet[IOFplotData$Group == "Metatheria"] <- 23



```

# Plot
```{r IOF Plot}
svglite(filename = here::here("Figures", "IOF_Mass_v3.svg"),
        height = 5, width = 6)
plot(NULL,
     xlim = range(IOFplotData$log_Mass),
     ylim = range(IOFplotData$log_IOF),
     xlab = "log10 Body Mass (g)",                       
     ylab = "log10 IOF (mm2)")
polygon(placentalHull[pHpts, ],
        col = adjustcolor("#808080", alpha.f = 0.33))
polygon(metatheriaHull[mHpts, ],
        col = adjustcolor("#1680a4", alpha.f = 0.33))
points(IOFplotData$log_Mass, IOFplotData$log_IOF,
       pch = IOFplotData$PtSet,
       col = "#000000",
       bg = IOFplotData$PtCol,
       cex = 1.5)
# text(IOFplotData$log_Mass, IOFplotData$log_IOF,  #for plotting species names
#      IOFplotData$ID,
#      cex=0.6,
#      pos=1,
#      offset = -0.6)
legend("topleft", 
       legend = c("Placentals", "Metatherians", "Thylacinids"), 
       pch = c(21, 23, 23),
       col = c("#000000", "#000000", "#000000"),
       pt.bg = c("#fff0e0", "#e0f0ff", "#c87ef8"), 
       bty = "n", 
       pt.cex = 2, 
       cex = 1, 
       text.col = "black", 
       horiz = F , 
       inset = c(0.01, 0.0))
dev.off()
```
